features: 【Special design for HERO 13 Black】The silicone case perfectly fits the Go Pro Hero 13 Black camera frame to achieve seamless installation and precise accuracy.A safety rope is hung on the silicone sleeve to provide more protection for the camera.With the replacement side cover with a small side door, it is easier to charge. It can prevent dust and splash water stains from entering the camera.
【NOTE】The replaced side door cannot be directly immersed in water for use!!!

【2 PACK SCREEN PROTECTOR FOR HERO 13】2 Pack screen protector kit safeguard the lens and touch screen on your HERO 13 from scuffs and scratches when the going gets tough. Made from tempered glass, these protectors feature anti-fingerprint and anti-reflective coatings so your footage looks its best.

【LATEST SILICONE CASE FOR HERO13】Premium Silicone Protective Case protects your Hero13 from scratches without adding extra bulk.Side Open Design allows you to charge the camera while recording for extended run times.
